name: Logistics Route Loss Calculator
description: Calculates total route loss (cost and time) for a logistics route, identifying hidden loss drivers and suggesting improvement actions based on industrial engineering standards (Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Route Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total distance of the route from origin to destination.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance of the route from origin to destination.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rota mesafesi, başlangıç noktasından varış noktasına toplam mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtdistanz der Route vom Start zum Ziel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale du trajet de l'origine à la destination.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total de la ruta desde el origen hasta el destino.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة الإجمالية للمسار من نقطة البداية إلى الوجهة.

inputs.label: Average Speed (km/h)
inputs.businessContext: Expected average speed under normal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average speed under normal conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal koşullar altında beklenen ortalama hız.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse moyenne attendue dans des conditions normales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad media esperada en condiciones normales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط السرعة المتوقعة في الظروف العادية.

inputs.label: Planned Stops
inputs.businessContext: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of planned stops along the route (e.g., for pickup/delivery).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rota boyunca planlı durak sayısı (örneğin, yükleme/boşaltma için).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der geplanten Stopps entlang der Route (z. B. für Abholung/Lieferung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'arrêts planifiés le long du trajet (ex. pour ramassage/livraison).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de paradas planificadas en la ruta (p. ej., para recogida/entrega).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد التوقفات المخطط لها على طول المسار (مثل التحميل/التفريغ).

inputs.label: Average Stop Time (min)
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent per stop, including waiting and handling.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time spent per stop, including waiting and handling.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bekleme ve elleçleme dahil, durak başına ortalama süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit pro Stopp, einschließlich Warte- und Bearbeitungszeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen passé par arrêt, y compris l'attente et la manutention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo medio por parada, incluyendo espera y manipulación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الوقت المستغرق لكل توقف، بما في ذلك الانتظار والمناولة.

inputs.label: Traffic Delay Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of driving time lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).

label_i18n.fr: Facteur de retard dû au trafic

businessContext_i18n.en: Fraction of driving time lost due to traffic congestion (0 = none, 1 = 100% delay).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trafik sıkışıklığı nedeniyle kaybedilen sürüş süresinin oranı (0 = yok, 1 = %100 gecikme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil der Fahrzeit, der durch Verkehrsstaus verloren geht (0 = keine, 1 = 100 % Verzögerung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction du temps de conduite perdue à cause des embouteillages (0 = aucun, 1 = 100 % de retard).
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción del tiempo de conducción perdida por congestión (0 = ninguna, 1 = 100% de demora).
businessContext_i18n.ar: جزء من وقت القيادة المفقود بسبب الازدحام المروري (0 = لا شيء، 1 = تأخير 100%).

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel cost per kilometer for the vehicle type.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel cost per kilometer for the vehicle type.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Araç tipi için km başına ortalama yakıt maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kraftstoffkosten pro Kilometer für den Fahrzeugtyp.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen du carburant par kilomètre pour le type de véhicule.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste medio de combustible por kilómetro para el tipo de vehículo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط تكلفة الوقود لكل كيلومتر لنوع المركبة.

inputs.label: Driver Wage per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of the driver (including benefits).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage of the driver (including benefits).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire du conducteur (incluant les avantages).
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora del conductor (incluyendo prestaciones).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الأجر بالساعة للسائق (بما في ذلك المزايا).

inputs.label: Vehicle Operating Cost per km
inputs.businessContext: Non-fuel operating costs per km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).

label_i18n.fr: Coût d'exploitation du véhicule par km
label_i18n.es: Coste operativo del vehículo por km

businessContext_i18n.en: Non-fuel operating costs per km (maintenance, tires, depreciation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: km başına yakıt dışı işletme maliyetleri (bakım, lastik, amortisman).
businessContext_i18n.de: Nicht-kraftstoffbezogene Betriebskosten pro km (Wartung, Reifen, Abschreibung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts d'exploitation hors carburant par km (entretien, pneus, amortissement).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costes operativos no relacionados con combustible por km (mantenimiento, neumáticos, depreciación).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكاليف التشغيل غير المتعلقة بالوقود لكل كيلومتر (الصيانة، الإطارات، الاستهلاك).

rules.message: Average speed and route distance must be positive.
Average stop time cannot be negative.
Traffic delay factor must be between 0 and 1.
All cost inputs must be non-negative.
Transit time target must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Fuel cost per km is above typical threshold (0.5 currency/km). Consider route optimization or vehicle efficiency review.
Number of planned stops exceeds 10. May increase idle time and handling losses.
Traffic delay factor exceeds 30%. Significant time loss expected. Consider alternative routing or time-of-day adjustments.
Target transit time is less than 120% of ideal driving time. Likely unrealistic without significant process improvements.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
